evidence: `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:4647-4651` now derives agent record metadata from `envelope.metadata.backend_used.family` and `envelope.metadata.model_used.model_id`, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:4704-4712` persists that producer onto the `ArtifactRecord` written for stage artifacts.

`src/adapters/fs.rs:1079-1106` serializes the full `ArtifactRecord` with `serde_json::to_string_pretty(artifact)`, so the backend/model metadata attached in engine persistence is what lands in `history/artifacts/*.json`.
`src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:402-437` has a regression test proving `InvocationEnvelope.metadata` preserves the adapter-reported backend/model rather than the configured target.

`src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:1513-1604` has an end-to-end regression test asserting persisted artifact JSON uses the envelope metadata (`codex` / `actual-model-from-envelope`) instead of the configured target, and it passes. I also verified `nix develop -c cargo check` passes.
